title: Preparing for the Fair with a Pure Heart!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for showing me around today! 
I'm really looking forward to trying your recommended gourmet food, Pokke.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Yeah～ You're on the committee for, what was it, the racecourse gourmet fair?

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Things get pretty heated during the races. A lot of people'll probably be craving somethin' cold, so I think this'll hit the spot, right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Mmm, it's delicious…! It's no wonder there's a line.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: Right～? It just opened recently, but it got popular in no time.

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Yay, three scoops!! Ah!!

text_block_list.name: Grumpy Man
text_block_list.text: Ow, what the hell, kid――Gah!? You got ice cream all over me! These clothes are expensive, you know!!

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah～～～!!

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: You bastard… ――Huh?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Are you okay, little guy? Can you stand up? Wanna share some of mine?

text_block_list.name: Boy A
text_block_list.text: Really!? Yay!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Would you like some too, mister? This place is really delicious. We can clean that stain off your clothes while we're at it, alright?

text_block_list.name: Appeased Man
text_block_list.text: O-Oh… Well, I suppose so… It's not the ice cream's fault, after all…

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: …Haha, guess I didn't need to step in after all.

text_block_list.name: Jungle Pocket
text_block_list.text: ――Hey, this flavor's pretty good too! Let's all eat up!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow…! You always have your teatime at such a wonderful cafe, Gentil…!

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: It's an elegant shop, isn't it? The coffee is excellent as well.

text_block_list.name: New Customer
text_block_list.text: Hey now, I thought this was a fancy joint, but there are students here too～ This isn't a fast-food place, you know～?

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: ……Excuse me――

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I guess I was trying to act a bit grown-up! What are you eating, mister?

text_block_list.name: New Customer
text_block_list.text: Huh? A-Ah～ This is a cheese and fig pintxo…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Wow, how fancy…! I wonder if there's a demand for that at the racecourse too.

text_block_list.name: New Customer
text_block_list.text: Oh, at the racecourse? It'd definitely feel rich to snack on these while watching the races～!

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: …My. How very like you, Buena.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: A gourmet fair… What a wonderful project. I hope my information will be of some use to you.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Your cooperation is a huge help. 
As expected of your recommendation, Journey, this place is incredibly popular.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: I apologize for the long wait. But we should be up soon――… No, perhaps it will take a bit longer.

text_block_list.name: Rough Customer
text_block_list.text: What the hell, I'm starvin' here! Hurry up and get me a seat already!

text_block_list.name: Restaurant Staff
text_block_list.text: I am so sorry! We're currently quite crowded, so just a little longer――

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: Buena, if you'd like, you can take a seat on that bench until we're called――

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Mister, would you like to share a table with us?

text_block_list.name: Rough Customer
text_block_list.text: ――Huh?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: You're starving, aren't you? I thought you might be able to sit down a bit faster if we shared… What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Rough Customer
text_block_list.text: …O-Oh. Well, alright…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One afternoon, while eating at a popular restaurant… For some reason, an academy student at the next table over began sharing her table with a rather rough-looking man…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: So good～! It's so warm… I feel like it's melting the tension right out of my heart!

text_block_list.name: Rough Customer
text_block_list.text: Yeah… It's kinda soothing. Eatin' a warm meal like this… Ya know…

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: ――Yes, truly. The power of delicious food is a magnificent thing.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: I've always thought of you as dangerously naive, but… Perhaps innocence taken to its absolute extreme simply leaves one without enemies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure how it came to this, but… The atmosphere Buena Vista carries seems to have smoothed things over. Feeling a bit relieved, I turned back to my own meal.
